title: utania volubilis var. microcalyx
intro: Utania volubilis var. microcalyx, also known as the small calyx utania, is a variety of the Utania volubilis plant, a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Utania volubilis var. microcalyx include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
